name: Tsona | Chilling with your Bestie on Valentines Day
description:
W4A

Valentines day! Such an amazing day for every couple in the world right now… Besides you. Unfortunately, your GIRLFRIEND is currently busy dealing with family problems, leaving you all alone to do whatever it is you do… But instead of grovelling over such issues you decided to spend the day with Tsona, your best friend.

Uhhh hi guys ? Kinda been a bit lol, work got kinda in the way and i got bored of bot makin but i rememberd no one rly had made a bot bout this so uhhh enjoy.

Oh and happy valentines day to yall.

Btw I am probs not gonna upload as much as i used to so uhhh consider me "basically retired" i will release one once in a while or smth if i get a good idea.
creator: Gundam☾
